paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 254 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 172 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 58 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 4 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 52 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 40 days past due with 37 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 52 days past due with 35 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 31 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **61 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 50 days past due with 29 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 26 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **45 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 26 days past due with 17 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 15 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Karim-Merchant:** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **24 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 9 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 71 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 55 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 39 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jonas De Cardenas:** Carrying 37 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

283 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **254 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 86 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 60 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 71. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 52 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 39 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 15 overdue — oldest first. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
